title: Hot work near hydrocarbon or gas hazard
requirement: Hot-work controls should consider nearby flammable gas readings before work proceeds.

title: Confined-space entry atmospheric checks
requirement: Confined-space work requires atmospheric monitoring and escalation when toxic/flammable readings trend toward alarm.

title: Simultaneous operations review
requirement: Concurrent permits in the same or adjacent zones must be reviewed for spatial and temporal conflict.

title: Shift handover risk continuity
requirement: Open hazards and active permits must be explicitly carried across shift handover.

title: Gas drift monitoring across zones
requirement: Gas trends across adjacent zones must be reviewed for drift, not only single-sensor threshold breach.

title: Energy isolation confirmation
requirement: Isolation status must be confirmed and linked to active permits before hazardous work continues.

title: Tank farm transfer vigilance
requirement: Tank farm transfers require monitoring for leak, overflow, vapor cloud, and ignition-source exposure.

title: Adjacent-zone risk
requirement: Spatial adjacency must be considered when active work in one zone can affect workers or equipment nearby.

title: Zone evacuation readiness
requirement: Escalation procedures must define when workers are moved out of affected and adjacent zones.

title: Emergency communications
requirement: Safety alerts must be delivered through multiple channels with clear zone, hazard, and action wording.

title: Sensor health and trust
requirement: Stale, stuck, missing, or implausible readings must degrade confidence and be visible to operators.

title: Action auditability
requirement: Operator decisions, recommendations, and evidence snapshots must be attributable and tamper-evident.

title: Incident evidence preservation
requirement: Safety events must preserve source readings, permit identifiers, timestamps, and operator actions.

title: Operator feedback loop
requirement: False alarms, useful alerts, and operator rationale must be retained to tune intelligence without hiding uncertainty.
